mapper.select: SELECT twhg.*, hr.hr_nm, COUNT(twhgc.health_opinion) as counsel_cnt, COUNT(twhgr.counsel_start) as request_cnt FROM esg.tb_worker_health_guide twhg LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hr on hr.hr_id = twhg.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_worker_health_guide_counsel twhgc ON twhgc.write_year = twhg.write_year AND twhgc.doc_no = twhg.doc_no AND twhgc.doc_type = twhg.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_worker_health_guide_request twhgr ON twhgr.write_year = twhg.write_year AND twhgr.doc_no = twhg.doc_no AND twhgr.doc_type = twhg.doc_type WHERE 1 = 1 AND twhg.comp_id = #{compId} AND twhg.write_year = #{writeYear} GROUP BY twhg.write_year, twhg.doc_type, twhg.doc_no, twhg.comp_id, twhg.hr_id, twhg.orgn_nm, twhg.sex,twhg.age,twhg.service_years,twhg.counsel_dt,twhg.use_yn,twhg.created_at,twhg.created_by,twhg.updated_at,twhg.updated_by, hr.hr_nm ORDER BY twhg.use_yn DESC, twhg.counsel_dt DESC, twhg.doc_no DESC
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_seq, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docSeq FROM esg.tb_worker_health_guide_hr WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType} AND doc_no = #{docNo}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_worker_health_guide_hr ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, doc_seq, comp_id, gubun, hr_id, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{docSeq}, #{compId}, #{gubun}, #{hrId}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: SELECT twhg.*, hr.hr_nm, twhgc.health_opinion, twhgc.aftercare_opinion, twhgc.work_aptitude_yn, twhgc.corrective_action, twhgc.use_yn as counsel_use_yn, twhgr.counsel_start || ' ~ ' || twhgr.counsel_end AS counsel_time, twhgr.counsel_start, twhgr.counsel_end, twhgr.counsel_location, twhgr.counsel_reason, twhgr.counsel_content, twhgr.counsel_result, twhgr.use_yn as request_use_yn FROM esg.tb_worker_health_guide twhg LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info hr on hr.hr_id = twhg.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_worker_health_guide_counsel twhgc ON twhgc.write_year = twhg.write_year AND twhgc.doc_no = twhg.doc_no AND twhgc.doc_type = twhg.doc_type LEFT JOIN esg.tb_worker_health_guide_request twhgr ON twhgr.write_year = twhg.write_year AND twhgr.doc_no = twhg.doc_no AND twhgr.doc_type = twhg.doc_type WHERE 1 = 1 AND twhg.comp_id = #{compId} AND twhg.write_year = #{writeYear} AND twhg.doc_no = #{docNo} AND twhg.doc_type = #{docType}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LPAD((COALESCE(MAX(SUBSTRING(doc_no, 1, 5)::INTEGER), 0) + 1)::TEXT, 5, '0') AS docNo FROM esg.tb_worker_health_guide WHERE write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_type = #{docType}
INSERT INTO esg.tb_worker_health_guide ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, comp_id, hr_id, orgn_nm, sex, age, service_years, counsel_dt, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{compId}, #{hrId}, #{orgnNm}, #{sex}, #{age}, #{serviceYears}, #{counselDt}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_worker_health_guide_counsel ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, health_opinion, aftercare_opinion, work_aptitude_yn, corrective_action, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{healthOpinion}, #{aftercareOpinion}, #{workAptitudeYn}, #{correctiveAction}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )

INSERT INTO esg.tb_worker_health_guide_request ( write_year, doc_no, doc_type, counsel_start, counsel_end, counsel_location, counsel_reason, counsel_content, counsel_result, use_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{writeYear}, #{docNo}, #{docType}, #{counselStart}, #{counselEnd}, #{counselLocation}, #{counselReason}, #{counselContent}, #{counselResult}, #{useYn}, now(), #{createdBy} )
mapper.select: select t1.hr_id , t1.hr_nm , t1.sex_div as sex , esg.fn_gethrinfocalc(t1.hr_id, 'AGE_HR') as age , esg.fn_gethrinfocalc(t1.hr_id, 'SERVICE_YEAR') as service_years from esg.tb_hr_info t1 left join esg.tb_worker_health_guide t2 on t1.hr_id = t2.hr_id and t2.counsel_dt = replace(#{counselDt}, '.', '') where t1.orgn_id = #{orgnId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' and t2.counsel_dt is null
select t1.hr_id , t1.hr_nm from esg.tb_hr_info t1 where t1.orgn_id = #{orgnId} and t1.use_yn = 'Y' order by ord_seq asc
mapper.update: UPDATE esg.tb_worker_health_guide_request SET counsel_start = #{counselStart}, counsel_end = #{counselEnd}, counsel_location = #{counselLocation}, counsel_reason = #{counselReason}, counsel_content = #{counselContent}, counsel_result = #{counselResult}, use_yn = #{requestUseYn}, updated_at = now(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE 1 = 1 AND write_year = #{writeYear} AND doc_no = #{docNo} AND doc_type = #{docType}
